assessed.note: PMJAY empanelment economics: HBP top-ups +10-15% NABH, +10% aspirational districts -- margin lever for hospital chains (hospitals.pmjay.gov.in live)
DDU-GKY pays private training companies (PIAs) per candidate ~Rs 35k-100k+
MSP-for-MFP price floors (~87 items) + Van Dhan; corporate exposure via ayurveda/FMCG input sourcing
IFCI-run VC Fund for SCs (equity into SC-promoted companies); SCLCSS cross-ref -> MSME ministry
PM VIKAS: companies only as empanelled training partners
Monument Mitra = CSR visibility, no fiscal incentive
Khelo India academy funding per-athlete; sports-goods mfg sits with MSME/DPIIT

notable: PMJAY empanelment is the sleeper company-facing lever in Health
DDU-GKY the only firm-facing RD channel
AIM grants are NITI's one firm-facing money channel
